name: 3Commas
description_short: Leading crypto trading bot platform with DCA bots, grid bots, signal bots, and smart portfolio management across 20+ exchanges.
description_long:
3Commas is one of the most established crypto trading bot platforms, offering automated trading across 20+ cryptocurrency exchanges including Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, and Bybit. The platform provides multiple bot types including DCA (Dollar-Cost Averaging) bots, Grid bots, and Signal bots that can execute strategies 24/7 without manual intervention.

The SmartTrade terminal adds advanced order types like trailing stop-loss, take-profit ladders, and simultaneous stop-loss/take-profit orders that most exchanges don't natively support. The portfolio management dashboard gives a unified view of holdings across all connected exchanges.

Plans range from Free (with basic features) to Pro at $99/month with all bot types, futures trading support, and unlimited concurrent bots. Annual subscriptions offer approximately 50% savings. The AI Assistant is included in all plans and provides trading insights and bot configuration suggestions.
pros: Multiple bot types for different strategies
Free tier available with basic functionality
cons: Crypto only, no stocks or forex
